title: Drafts App Integration
excerpt: Does anyone know of any integration to send text from the Drafts app to Monday.com?

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know of any integration to send text from the Drafts app to Monday.com?

posts.author: weareborg (Kenneth Killeen)
posts.cookedHtml: Would LOVE THIS! Both have a robust API so anyone with experience could whip one up I’m sure? Sadly, I don’t have any experience with this myself but find it crazy useful for other apps. Drafts is where all my notes begin.
